tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(let [hot-services (map :project (sql "SELECT project FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' GROUP BY project HAVING COUNT(*) > 5"))]
  (let [triggered-incidents (sql "SELECT id FROM pagerduty_incidents WHERE status = 'triggered' AND project IN (:hot-services)")]
    (doseq [id triggered-incidents]
      (acknowledge_incident id))
    (count triggered-incidents)))"}

tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(let [hot-services (map :project (github_issues {:state "open"})); Replace with actual hot service detection
       triggered-incidents (pagerduty_incidents {:status "triggered"})]
  (doseq [incident triggered-incidents]
    (update! :pagerduty_incidents (merge incident {:status "acknowledged"})))
  (count triggered-incidents))"}

message: update! takes (update! :table {:set-col value} {:match-col value}) — the SET map first, then the match map
